currentFocus: PatchBench DTO helper-output tests and the rebuild front-door chain map are integrated on main; docs/state now point the next executable slice at bounded PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage test hardening.

currentDocsTruth.integratedWave: Canonical docs/state summarize the PatchBench DTO helper-output tests and rebuild front-door chain map without treating local campaign reports, local worktree paths, or unreachable worker commits as durable public truth.
currentDocsTruth.stateReconciliation: goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, documentation_agent_state.json, and re_orchestrator_state.json record the integrated wave, the next bounded test-hardening slice, and explicit non-claims.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildFrontDoor: ROADMAP-INDEX links the compact rebuild-front-door chain map. The map is routing/discoverability only and does not claim runtime, visual, gameplay, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference parity.
currentDocsTruth.frontDoorHygiene: coordination/README.md avoids a literal local campaign-root example, and PUBLIC_SIGNOFF_COMMANDS uses a placeholder private root for maintainer-only parity proof.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md maintainer-local Ghidra descriptors remain intentional overlay exceptions. Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, package output, local runtime caches, raw proof evidence, and local proof paths stay out of tracked docs/state unless a public-safe summary is explicitly warranted.
currentDocsTruth.releasePublicationStatus: No release, tag, package, signing, installer, announcement, hosted workflow, or publication action is part of this integration.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: DTO helper-output tests, rebuild routing docs, front-door hygiene, and state reconciliation only; no AppCore, patch catalog row, byte patch, launch argument, safe-copy manifest/signature, runtime proof, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim change.

currentCounters.catalogRows: 29/29 target specimen identity and policy metadata rows

validation.currentIntegration: Integration gates cover docs/repo, payload, WinUI build, focused PatchBench DTO helper-output tests, broader PatchBench/patch-engine safety, hard-payload, and primary-lane validation evidence.
validation.nextSlice: Prefer the bounded PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage test-hardening slice before broader modularity work.

nextSteps: Before the next write, verify live HEAD, origin/main, and remote refs/heads/main.
Keep docs and state free of local campaign paths and unreachable worker-commit dependencies.

Keep product, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, and installed-game mutation claims bounded to accepted evidence.
